instruction: <FLIGHT>Your user id is sophia_silva_7557. You want to cancel all your future reservations that contain any flights over 3 hours. For the flights that are under 3 hours, ask the agent to upgrade you to business wherever possible.

dialogue_state.initial_segment: cancel all your future reservations that contain any flights over 3 hours
dialogue_state.initial_query: Cancel all my future reservations with any flights over 3 hours

hints.segment: ask the agent to upgrade you to business wherever possible
hints.hint: For flights under 3 hours, can you upgrade me to business class wherever possible?
Only apply upgrades to flights under 3 hours
